metadata.title: The Lost Caves of Arath
metadata.author: Example Designer
metadata.description: An ancient cave system full of danger and mystery.

regions.name: Cave System
regions.description: A labyrinth of tunnels beneath the mountains.

locations.name: Cave Entrance
locations.description: A yawning mouth in the cliffside, cold air seeping out.

locations.name: Dark Tunnel
locations.description: A narrow passage with walls damp to the touch.

items.name: Torch
items.description: A wooden torch. Burns for about an hour.

npcs.name: Old Guard
npcs.description: A weary guard in rusty armor.

effect.message: A swarm of bats rushes past you!
